name: Ferplast Dog Leash CLBg15/120 5955
description: Its standout feature is the full-length reflective strip, which ensures you and your dog remain visible during low-light walks whether it’s an early morning stroll, a cloudy afternoon, or an evening adventure. The reflective material catches and bounces light back toward drivers, cyclists, and pedestrians, adding an essential layer of safety without compromising style. Key Benefits: • Durable nylon construction for long-lasting use • Full-length reflective strip for increased nighttime visibility • Multiple color options to match collars and harnesses • Lightweight design for comfortable handling during long walks
